diagrams.title: Semantic Network Structure
diagrams.description: A directed graph representation showing concepts as nodes connected by labeled edges representing relationships. This visualizes how knowledge is organized hierarchically with is-a and instance-of relationships, making it easy to see inheritance and property propagation.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how semantic networks represent knowledge through nodes and weighted edges, demonstrating inheritance, categorization, and property sharing between concepts

diagrams.title: Frame Structure with Slots and Inheritance
diagrams.description: A hierarchical frame diagram showing a superframe (Animal) with general slots, and a subclass frame (Bird) inheriting those slots while adding its own specific slots. Demonstrates the slot-filler structure and inheritance hierarchy in frame-based knowledge representation.
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates frame-based representation with slots, fillers, default values, and inheritance, showing how frames organize knowledge in a structured, object-oriented manner

diagrams.title: Script Representation: Restaurant Scenario
diagrams.description: A sequential event chain diagram representing a script for the restaurant scenario. Shows chronological progression of events with roles, props, and conditions at each stage, demonstrating how scripts represent stereotypical situations.
elements: Order scene (customer orders, waiter takes order)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates script-based knowledge representation showing sequential event patterns, roles involved, props used, and expected outcomes for stereotypical scenarios
